response.step_by_step_log: The video was observed for content. From 00:00 to 01:08, VTubers were engaged in conversation. At 01:09, the song title "花に亡霊" and composer/songwriter "n-buna" (associated with Yorushika) appeared on screen. I identified the group of VTubers performing the song. I used the search query "花に亡霊 Yorushika Japanese and English lyrics" to find the original lyrics and their English translation.
response.global_summary: This video features a conversation among four VTubers (Momosuzu Nene, Yukihana Lamy, Omaru Polka, and Shishiro Botan), followed by a musical performance of "Hana ni Bourei" by Yorushika.

scenes.description: The four VTubers perform a cover of "Hana ni Bourei" by Yorushika.
scenes.performer_in_video: Momosuzu Nene, Yukihana Lamy, Omaru Polka, Shishiro Botan
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もう忘れてしまったかな
夏の木陰に座ったまま
氷菓を口に放り込んで風を待っていた
もう忘れてしまったかな
世の中の全部嘘だらけ
本当の価値を二人で探しに行こうと笑ったこと
忘れないように 色褪せないように
形に残るものが全てじゃないように
言葉をもっと教えて さよならだって教えて
今も見るんだよ 夏に咲いてる花に亡霊を
想い出なんて忘れて
浅い呼吸をする、汗を拭って夏めく
もう忘れてしまったかな
夏の木陰に座った頃
遠くの丘から顔出した雲があったじゃないか
君はそれを掴もうとして
馬鹿みたいに空を切った手で
僕は紙に雲一つを書いて
笑って握って見せて
忘れないように 色褪せないように
歴史に残るものが全てじゃないから
言葉をもっと教えて さよならだって教えて
今も見るんだよ 夏に咲いてる花に亡霊を
言葉じゃなくて時間を
時間じゃなくて心を
浅い呼吸をする、汗を拭って夏めく
夏めく
夏めく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I wonder if I’ve already forgotten
I sat in the shade of a summer tree, throwing an ice cream cone into my mouth, waiting for the wind to blow.
I wonder if I’ve already forgotten
The whole world is just a pack of lies
We laughed together, saying we’d go find the true value of it
So I don’t forget, so it doesn’t fade
So it isn’t just about things that leave a shape
Teach me more words, teach me even about goodbye
I’m still seeing it now, a ghost in the flower that blooms in summer
I don’t want memories, I want to forget
Taking shallow breaths, I wipe away my sweat and it feels like summer
I wonder if I’ve already forgotten
At the time I sat in the shade of a summer tree
There was a cloud that poked its face out from the hill in the distance, wasn’t there?
You tried to grab it, and with your hand that cut through the air like a fool
I drew a cloud on a piece of paper, and laughed, grabbing it to show you
So I don’t forget, so it doesn’t fade
Because it isn’t about things that remain in history
Teach me more words, teach me even about goodbye
I’m still seeing it now, a ghost in the flower that blooms in summer
It’s not about words, it’s about time
It’s not about time, it’s about the heart
Taking shallow breaths, I wipe away my sweat and it feels like summer
It feels like summer
It feels like summer
